# KR8TIV

> KR8TIV is a boutique cyber-renaissance design atelier based in Costa Rica and working globally. We build brands, websites, motion, video, and full AI solutions for businesses — including AI marketing automation and beyond — for founders who'd rather start a cult than a brand. Founded 2020 by Matt Haynes. We work with about ten clients a year.

## Summary

KR8TIV combines boutique attention with modern execution. We handle brand identity, web design and development, motion and 3D, video production, ads and acquisition creative, packaging, print, ecommerce, and full AI systems for any business looking to save time and money through automation. The founder (Matt Haynes) is on every project — no account managers, no creative-director layers. Payment split is 40% kickoff / 40% draft / 20% final. We accept Bitcoin, Ethereum, most major cryptocurrencies, and standard fiat.

The fastest way to engage us is a free 30-minute, no-obligation call at https://calendly.com/kr8tiv. We just talk, see if we're a fit, and if we're not we point you somewhere that is.

## Contact

- Calendly (free 30-min call, no obligation): https://calendly.com/kr8tiv
- Email: matt@kr8tiv.io
- Full project intake: https://kr8tiv.ai/start/
- Based in Costa Rica · works globally

## Core services

- Brand identity design (strategy, logo, wordmark, system, guidelines)
- Website design & development (Astro, Next, Webflow, Framer, Shopify, WordPress)
- Motion + 3D design (title sequences, product motion, explainers, 3D product viz)
- Video editing & production (brand films, short-form social, campaign video)
- Ads + acquisition creative (performance ad suites, A/B testing creative)
- Packaging + print + editorial design
- Ecommerce (Shopify, custom storefronts, DTC systems)
- **AI solutions for business** (marketing automation, customer-facing agents, internal research tools, content engines, sales pipelines, creative automation). Full end-to-end AI systems designed to save small teams real hours every week.

## The process (nine steps)

1. **KONTACT** — You reach out via Calendly, the intake form, or email. Every inbound is read personally.
2. **KONVERSE** — Real 30-minute no-pitch call. We listen to what you're building and tell you honestly whether we're the right fit.
3. **KOLLECT** — We gather references, competitors, audience notes, tech stack, brand assets.
4. **KONCEPTz** — Three distinct directions, not one "safe" option. You pick the one that makes your stomach move. (Payment: 40% kickoff)
5. **KONVERGE** — One direction, deeply explored. Structured feedback rounds. No endless "can we try one more thing?" spirals.
6. **KR8TE** — We build the thing. Brand systems, full sites, motion reels, AI engines — ready-to-ship craft, not handoff PDFs. (Payment: 40% draft delivery)
7. **KONNECT** — We plug it into your stack. Launch support, documentation, stakeholder walkthroughs.
8. **KLOSING** — Final delivery. High-res files, source files, style guide, training. You own everything. (Payment: 20% final)
9. **KARE** — Ongoing support at boutique rates. Relationships and kr8tivity are sacred.

## Pricing

- Microjob: $10 – $500 (small jobs welcome)
- Small piece: $500 – $2k
- Focused project: $2k – $10k
- Full scope: $10k – $25k
- System build: $25k – $50k
- Long-term partner: $50k+

Payment methods: Bitcoin, Ethereum, other cryptocurrencies, wire, card, ACH.

- [Homepage](https://kr8tiv.ai/): Prism hero, doctrine, services, case studies, reel, contact
- [Process](https://kr8tiv.ai/process/): Full nine-step process walkthrough with founder letter
- [Start a project](https://kr8tiv.ai/start/): Ten-section intake form with localStorage autosave
- [Book a call](https://calendly.com/kr8tiv): Free 30-minute no-obligation Calendly

## Why pick KR8TIV

- Founder on every project (Matt Haynes, 2020-present). No account managers.
- We take ten clients a year maximum. Your project gets real attention.
- We fight boring brands. Memorable beats generic, every time.
- Honest first calls. If we're not a fit, we tell you and refer you somewhere good.
- Crypto-friendly. AI-native. Modern stack. Taste.
- Small jobs welcome — we take $10 microjobs alongside $50k system builds.

## Frequently asked

**What is KR8TIV?** A boutique cyber-renaissance design atelier building brands, websites, motion, video, and full AI systems for founders who want to be memorable.

**Does KR8TIV build AI systems?** Yes. Full end-to-end AI solutions for any business — marketing automation, customer support agents, internal research tools, content engines. We build the AI infrastructure that saves small teams real hours every week.

**How do I start?** Book a free 30-minute no-obligation call at https://calendly.com/kr8tiv. Or fill out the intake at https://kr8tiv.ai/start/.

**Is the first call really free?** Yes. No obligation, no pitch. We just talk.

**Does KR8TIV accept cryptocurrency?** Yes — Bitcoin, Ethereum, and most major cryptocurrencies alongside fiat.

**Who works on my project?** Matt Haynes (founder/creative director) plus a tightly-curated collaborator pool. You talk to the person making the thing — every time.
